---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or new feature for Ambatukam Go
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the use case?
A clear description of the problem motivates the change.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the proposed API or behavior change. Include a code sketch
if relevant.

```go
// your proposed API here
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you considered, and why you
prefer the proposed one.

## Additional Context

Links, benchmarks, related projects, or anything else that helps
frame the request.
